channel.title: Go Humble! RSS GAMES
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Metro Mania: Planes, Trains, and Automobiles!
item.description: Jump into the driver’s seat of fun
item.content:encoded:
All aboard! The Metro Mania Bundle of ultra-exciting planes-, trains-, and automobile-themed games is arriving at the station! Hit the open road in a variety of awesome off-roaders in Expeditions: A MudRunner Game, or fix train connections and traverse the globe in Railbound. Pay what you want for a fast-pass to fun with a curated collection of red-hot transportation games and let the good times roll!

Keys expire. Please redeem all titles by April 10, 2027.

item.title: Humble Heroines: Echoes, Voids, and Visions
item.content:encoded:
Tired of the same old beefy boy protagonists with cool guy attitudes and hypermasculine storylines? These female-fronted games are the perfect antidote to the dude-ly doldrums, and are available all in one convenient bundle! Use your psychic powers to uncover a mystery at an abandoned resort in The Medium. Enjoy the vibrant graphics and terrifying monsters in the metaphysical survival horror game Sorry We’re Closed. Save a dwindling society with the help of a frying pan and your mysterious powers in Eastward. There are even more fun games led by powerful heroines to discover in this bundle, so grab it now for the price of your choice—every purchase contributes to the Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before April 16, 2027.

item.title: Checkmate! A Chess Games Collection
item.content:encoded:
Think classic boardgames are played out? Think again! Explore new ways to play chess with the all-new Checkmate! Bundle. Flex your mental muscles in Pawnbarian, the quick-moving, turn-based puzzle roguelike that incorporates elements of chess to create a fresh experience. Or dive into an adventure rooted in the spirit of chess like Dark Chess, the story-driven campaign against evil kings and queens. Play these and the freshest chess titles around and simultaneously help support World Central Kitchen—now that’s a power move!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 8, 2027.

item.title: Multiplayer Madness 2026
item.description: Grab your friends and get playing
item.content:encoded:
Your next game night is getting an upgrade in the form of this bundle of great multiplayer shooters and co-ops that are best played with friends! Ammo doesn’t grow on trees—but it does grow in the fertile soil of Shotgun Farmers, where your missed shots grow more weapons for the whole party! Turn your friend group into a well-oiled tactical machine with Phantom Squad! Collect artifacts for your private museum in Fish Stick Protocol! Master card battles and dodge goofy memes in Rungore! There’s even more to enjoy in this multiplayer bundle, so grab your friends and grab these games for the price of your choosing—and support the lifesaving aid efforts of Care.org with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Phantom Squad before July 3rd, 2026. Redeem all others before April 3rd, 2027

item.title: Metroidvania Mayhem Bundle
item.content:encoded:
There’s nothing better than a really great Metroidvania game, and this bundle full of side-scrolling fantasy and sci-fi action has some of the best! Help an amnesiac girl battle monsters in a strange land in Lost Ruins! Play as a rabbit with a giant robot fist and liberate your city from its robotic oppressors in F.I.S.T.: Forged in Shadow Torch! Join a ruthless bounty hunter to explore the steampunk world and twist-filled story of Gestalt: Steam & Cinder! Whether you’re a fan of that classic pixelated style or you’re just really in the mood for a juicy adventure game, this bundle has everything you need for the price of your choice—and every purchase supports CARE!

Keys expire. Please redeem Ultros Deluxe Edition before October 1st, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before April 1st, 2027.

item.title: Frictional Games: Amnesia, SOMA, Penumbra
item.description: The hottest horror titles curated for you
item.content:encoded:
Three great franchises, one amazing publisher—pay what you want for the very best from Frictional Games. Brave the critically acclaimed Amnesia series—first-person horror adventures that challenge your wits and courage with inventive puzzles and a haunting atmosphere. Set in the depths of the Atlantic Ocean, SOMA is a sci-fi horror experience that will make you question your very existence. Flex your mental might in the puzzle-driven psychological horror adventure Penumbra Collectors Pack. Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support the Against Malaria Foundation!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 1st, 2027

item.title: The MIX Spring Showcase: Games Around The World
item.content:encoded:
The thick of winter is melting off, and the coolest games around are flowin’ downstream. Help support charity and unlock The Spring Mix Showcase; Filming viral videos with your friends goes very wrong when the supernatural are involved—have a spooktacular time with the co-op adventure Content Warning. Battle your exes, disappoint your parents, and cook up some revenge in the anti-dating sim, Thirsty Suitors. Your favorite bros are back with burn-based moves and a new mission in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tactical Takedown.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before March 30th, 2027.

item.title: The ESA All-Star Alliance Bundle
item.content:encoded:
What better way to celebrate a good cause than by getting your hands on some great games? Dive into some recent favorites and support one of gaming’s biggest nights with this tie-in bundle for the ESA Foundation’s Nite to Unite! Sink your saber teeth into the prehistoric action of Far Cry Primal! Defeat the conniving villains and reclaim the throne of Dishonored 2! Solve a series of old-timey murder mysteries in Pentiment! Become the ultimate organized crime kingpin in the Mafia Trilogy! Scavenge to survive the post-Apocalyptic zombie horde of State of Decay 2! Every purchase of this bundle at the price of your choosing benefits the Entertainment Software Association!

Keys expire. Please redeem Harry Potter: Quidditch Champions before September 27th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 27th, 2027.

item.title: Games Done Quick- Frost Fatales 2026
item.content:encoded:
Games Done Quick’s annual celebration of gaming and giving is back with Frost Fatales 2026, and we’re here to offer you a piece of the fun! Cut through Q-UP, the speedrunable line game that’s one part clicker, one part multiplayer strategy, one part demented capitalism simulator, and 100% addicting. Cozy up to Here Comes Niko!, the cutest little platformer with a massive heart. Or collect the blood of the gods to grow your power in Voidwrought, the hand-drawn action-platformer. Try your hand at a speedrun through one of these amazing games and help support the National Women’s Law Center with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem Yars Rising before September 27th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 27th, 2027

item.title: Best of Boomer Shooters 5: Penta Boom
item.content:encoded:
Say hello to the Penta BOOM Bundle! Boomers offer players the fastest, most brutal gameplay of the genre. Unlock bold visuals and even bolder gunplay with the inventive, upgrade-driven adventure Sulfur. Experience the unparalleled adrenaline rush of Metal Eden, a sci-fi FPS with breathtaking gameplay. Clear out a secluded mansion filled to the brim with demonic fiends one room at a time in Killing Time: Resurrected. Play these great boomer shooters and help support Oceana with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem Killing Time Resurrected before September 25th, 2026. All other titles should be redeemed before March 25th, 2027.
